title: AntiGEO Evidence
description: Schema for an AntiGEO evidence record used to support entity, proposal, and status-related review.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for the evidence record.

title.description: Short human-readable title of the evidence record.

evidence_type.description: Primary type of evidence represented by this record.

entity_ids.description: List of related entity identifiers referenced by this evidence record.

proposal_ids.description: Optional list of related proposal identifiers.

source_url.description: Original source URL for the evidence, when available.

archive_url.description: Archive URL, snapshot URL, or preservation link for the evidence, when available.

captured_at.description: Timestamp when the evidence was captured, observed, or recorded.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the evidence record was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the evidence record was last updated.

summary.description: Short summary of what the evidence shows.

claims_supported.description: Short claim labels or judgments supported by this evidence record.

context.description: Additional context needed to interpret the evidence correctly.

is_public.description: Whether the evidence is based on publicly accessible material.

source_name.description: Optional source name, publication name, or origin label.

language.description: Optional language code or language label associated with the evidence content.

notes.description: Optional freeform notes about the evidence record.

review_status.description: Lightweight review state for the evidence record.

related_evidence_ids.description: Optional list of related evidence record identifiers.
